rules: Customers do not run scripts, BAT files, PowerShell, scans, or setup work.
The system prompts only when consent, payment, law, platform rules, approval, or premium unlock requires it.
New premium capabilities are offered as optional paid upgrades or membership benefits.
No feature removal to force upgrade.
Live Shopify product mutation requires founder green-check.
